name: node-v8flags
title: node-v8flags
summary: Get available V8 JavaScript engine flags
description:
Get available V8 JavaScript engine flags
This package get flags passed to Node.js embedded
V8 Javascript engine.
.
V8 is a high performance JavaScript engine written in C++.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-v8flags because Get available V8 JavaScript engine flags.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-v8flags as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-v8flags with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-v8flags --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
